title: benstonea pectinata
intro: Benstonea pectinata, also known as the "Snake Palm," is a plant species native to the tropical forests of Papua New Guinea. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Benstonea pectinata include its ability to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues. Benstonea pectinata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
